publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-11-12 18:00:25 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Includes the minutes of the Faculty Senate meetings (1999-present), various reports concerning athletics, minority education, free speech, the Cranch report and other university issues.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: The Cornell University Senate was formed in 1970. Its predecessor, the Constituent Assembly, provided the preliminary organization. In 1977 the CU Senate was replaced by the Cornell Faculty Council of Representatives and in February 1996 this was replaced by the Faculty Senate.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes the minutes of the Faculty Senate meetings (1999-present), various reports concerning athletics, minority education, free speech, the Cranch report and other university issues.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: Related collection: Cornell University Dean of Faculty Records, #11-1-1279

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dean of Faculty records, #11-1-3282. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

controlaccess.subject: Freedom of speech.
Minorities -- Education (Higher) -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
African Americans -- Study and teaching -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.

did.unittitle: Committee on Academic Programs and Policies - 1973 Statement on the Center for Improvement of Undergraduate Education and Report
An Approach to Black Studies - by James Turner; Report on Wari House; Faculty Appointments for Afro-American Studies - from W. K. Kennedy
Task Force on Athletics - 1999; CU NCAA Athletics Certification Self-Study - 1998
Cornell in the Seventies - memos, correspondence, response
Cranch Committee- President's Committee on Long Range Financing for the University - 1972; FCR Response - 1973
Activism - CU Administration's comments; demands of the Student Alliance Against Racism
Letter to Cornell re: demonstrations - 1985; various clippings, memos re: disruptions - 1965-1989
Tuition protest - 1974; Faculty Volunteers Ad Hoc Committee - 1969
City of Ithaca Disturbance - Ad Hoc Committee Report
Disruptions - Faculty Council and Faculty Minutes
Report of the Committee on Academic Freedom and Tenure
History of the Financial Aid Policy Committee
Free Speech - Committee material, memos, correspondence
Report (Kahn-Bowers) of the Faculty Committee on the Quality of Undergraduate Instruction
Melby Report - To Advise on Ways of Increasing Outisde Research Support to the University
Minority Education Committee's Recommendations on Cohen/Gates Report
Report of the Special Committee of the University Faculty on Education - Olaf Larson
Commission on Interdependence of University Regulations
Status of Research Personnel - Van Riper - Chair
Ratner Report - Financial Status of the University
Report of South African Committee to FCR
Provost's Task Force on the Future of the Social Sciences at Cornell - Commissioned by Don Randel and Ron Ehrenberg
Stephen H. Weiss Presidential Fellows Committee
Governance Digest for Members of the Faculty Council of Representatives
